text.title: Claude Code Headless Default Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the task coding / devops / research / content authoring with shell affinity?

branch.when: coding_ish == true AND tools_fit_mcp == true AND shell_ok == true AND inner_loop_required == true

conclusion.verdict: Drop to SDK with documented switch_trigger.

branch.when: coding_ish == true AND tools_fit_mcp == true AND shell_ok == true AND inner_loop_required == false

conclusion.verdict: Use claude-code-headless with four guards (-p, --allowedTools, --max-turns, stream-json).

branch.when: coding_ish == true AND tools_fit_mcp == true AND shell_ok == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
